config.endpoints.items.name: Endpoint display name
config.endpoints.items.models: Model list (Phase 2: can be empty for auto-detection)
config.endpoints.items.models.items.name: Model display name
config.endpoints.items.models.items.capa: Tool calling capability: false = unsupported, true = unlimited, number = max tools
Override endpoint-level vision proxy model ID (Phase 2)
config.apiKey: Global fallback API Key (SecretStorage is recommended)
walkthrough.title: Getting Started with Copilot Custom Bridge
walkthrough.description: Configure in 3 steps to use third-party models in Copilot Chat
walkthrough.step1.title: Configure Endpoint
walkthrough.step1.description: Add an API endpoint configuration in settings.json
walkthrough.step2.title: Set API Key
walkthrough.step2.description: Set API Key for the endpoint (securely stored in SecretStorage)
walkthrough.step3.title: Select Model & Start Chat
walkthrough.step3.description: Switch to a third-party model in the Copilot Chat model picker
